title: All eyes on Spurs & West Ham? 'Unbelievable' Forest edge towards safety
summary: Nottingham Forest's dominant victory over Sunderland intensifies the Premier League relegation battle. With Forest now eight points clear of the bottom three, the fight for survival appears to have narrowed to a select group of clubs. The result significantly improves Forest's chances of avoiding the drop.
content: After Nottingham Forest's stunning win at Sunderland, is the Premier League relegation battle now a two-horse race?

zh.title: 众目睽睽：热刺与西汉姆？不可思议的森林队正逼近保级
zh.summary: 诺丁汉森林队以压倒性胜利击败桑德兰，激化了英超保级之争。森林队目前领先降级区8分，保级战争似乎已缩小到少数几支球队的争夺。这一胜利大大提升了森林队避免降级的机会。

title: Le Bris reacts to 'painful' defeat
summary: Sunderland manager Regis Le Bris criticized his team's poor start in their devastating 5-0 home loss to relegation-threatened Nottingham Forest. The manager expressed frustration over inconsistent home form as survival hopes fade. The defeat represents a significant setback in Sunderland's battle to avoid the drop.
content: Sunderland boss Regis Le Bris bemoans his sides "slow start" following a 5-0 defeat at the hands of relegation-threatened Nottingham Forest. He describes the loss as "painful", as his sides home form continues to slip.

zh.title: 勒布里斯回应"痛苦的"失利
zh.summary: 桑德兰主帅雷吉斯·勒布里斯批评了球队在主场0:5惨败于有降级危险的诺丁汉森林队时的糟糕开局。主帅对球队不稳定的主场表现感到失望，保级希望日渐渺茫。这场失利是桑德兰避免降级征途中的重大挫折。

title: 'It isn't enough' - Pereira insists still work to be done
summary: Nottingham Forest manager Vitor Pereira praised his team's commanding 5-0 victory over Sunderland but stressed that more points are needed to secure Premier League survival. Despite the dominant performance, Pereira emphasized that the job remains incomplete. The cautious outlook reflects the ongoing stakes in Forest's relegation battle.
content: Nottingham Forest Head Coach Vitor Pereira praises his side following a destructive 5-0 win over Sunderland, but insists that they still need 'more points' in their quest to avoid relegation.

zh.title: "这还不够"——佩雷拉坚持仍有工作要做
zh.summary: 诺丁汉森林队主帅维托·佩雷拉对球队5:0击败桑德兰的指挥性胜利表示赞赏，但强调需要更多积分来确保英超保级。尽管表现出众，佩雷拉强调工作仍未完成。这种谨慎的态度反映了森林队保级争夺中持续的高压。

title: Rogers open to European move - Saturday's gossip
summary: Several transfer developments emerge in football's gossip mill: winger Morgan Rogers is willing to consider a European transfer, defender Manuel Akanji is finalizing his move to Inter Milan, and Manchester City are confident in their pursuit of midfielder Elliot Anderson. These moves reflect the ongoing reshaping of top European squads.
content: Morgan Rogers is open to a European move, Manuel Akanji is set to make his Inter Milan move permanent and Manchester City are confident of signing Elliot Anderson.

zh.title: Rogers开放欧洲转会选择——周六足球八卦
zh.summary: 足球转会市场出现多项发展动向：边锋摩根·罗杰斯愿意考虑欧洲转会，后卫曼努埃尔·阿坎吉正在完成到国际米兰的转会，曼城对中场球员埃利奥特·安德森的追逐充满信心。这些动向反映了欧洲顶级球队的持续重组。

title: Forest stun Sunderland to boost survival hopes
summary: Nottingham Forest secured a crucial 5-0 victory over Sunderland, moving eight points clear of the Premier League's bottom three in their fight for survival. The dominant performance represents a significant turning point in Forest's season. The result strengthens their position in the tight relegation battle.
content: Nottingham Forest take a huge step towards Premier League survival, beating Sunderland 5-0 to go eight points clear of the bottom three.

zh.title: 森林队击败桑德兰队 提升保级希望
zh.summary: 诺丁汉森林队以5-0的压倒性胜利击败桑德兰队，在英超保级争夺战中领先排名垫底三队八分。这场主宰性的表现代表了森林队赛季的重大转折。这个结果加强了他们在激烈的降级保级争夺中的位置。

title: Dominant RB Leipzig see off Union Berlin
summary: RB Leipzig defeated Union Berlin through goals from Max Finkgrafe, Romulo, and Ridle Baku to secure three vital points in their pursuit of Champions League qualification. The comfortable victory demonstrates Leipzig's strong form in the title race. The win reinforces their position among Germany's top teams.
content: Goals from Max Finkgrafe, Romulo and Ridle Baku seal a comfortable win for RB Leipzig over Union Berlin, as they take three more points on their path to secure Champions League football next season.

zh.title: 强势莱比锡红牛击败联合柏林
zh.summary: RB莱比锡通过马克斯·芬克格拉夫、罗穆洛和里德尔·巴库的进球击败了联合柏林，在争夺欧冠资格赛的道路上获得了宝贵的三分。这场舒适的胜利展示了莱比锡在争冠竞争中的强劲状态。这场胜利加强了他们在德国顶级球队中的地位。

title: Prestianni banned for anti-gay slur to Vini Jr.
summary: UEFA handed Benfica's Gianluca Prestianni a six-match ban for anti-gay conduct directed at Real Madrid's Vinícius Júnior during a Champions League match in February. The sanction reflects UEFA's continued efforts to combat discriminatory behavior in professional football.
content: UEFA on Friday handed Benfica's Gianluca Prestianni a six-match ban for anti-gay conduct towards Real Madrid's Vinícius Júnior during their Champions League match in February.

zh.title: 普雷斯蒂亚尼因反同性恋辱骂维尼修斯被禁赛
zh.summary: 欧足联因贝尼菲卡球员詹卢卡·普雷斯蒂亚尼在二月欧冠比赛中对皇马球员维尼修斯进行反同性恋言论，给予其六场禁赛。该处罚体现了欧足联继续打击职业足球中歧视行为的努力。

title: WC final tickets listed on FIFA resale at over $2M
summary: FIFA's official resale platform is listing four tickets for the 2026 World Cup final at nearly $2.3 million each, highlighting the extreme scarcity and extraordinarily high demand for the tournament's flagship match.
content: FIFA's resale site has four tickets on sale for the World Cup final for just under $2.3 million each.

zh.title: 2026年世界杯决赛门票在国际足联转售平台上报价超200万美元
zh.summary: 国际足联官方转售平台列出2026年世界杯决赛的四张门票，每张接近230万美元，突显了该赛事旗舰比赛的极端稀缺性和超高需求。

title: Amnesty Int'l issues WC travel advisory for U.S.
summary: Amnesty International and numerous U.S. civil and human rights groups issued a travel advisory warning World Cup visitors about rising authoritarianism and increasing violence in the United States ahead of the 2026 tournament.
content: Amnesty International and dozens of U.S. civil and human rights groups issued a "World Cup travel advisory" Thursday, warning tournament visitors of "rising authoritarianism and increasing violence" in the United States.

zh.title: 国际特赦组织发布美国世界杯旅行警告
zh.summary: 国际特赦组织和众多美国民权及人权组织在2026年世界杯前发布旅行警告，提醒访客注意美国日益增长的专制主义和暴力问题。

title: Chelsea's Estêvão out for season amid WC worry
summary: Chelsea announced that winger Estêvão will miss the remainder of the season due to a hamstring injury, casting doubt on his availability for the 2026 World Cup and creating significant concerns for both club and country.
content: Chelsea confirmed on Friday that Estêvão will miss the rest of the season with a hamstring injury.

zh.title: 切尔西埃斯特瓦奥赛季报销 世界杯前景蒙阴影
zh.summary: 切尔西宣布边锋埃斯特瓦奥因腘绳肌拉伤将缺席本赛季剩余比赛，这使他的2026年世界杯参赛前景蒙上阴影，也给俱乐部和国家队带来了重大担忧。

title: Arteta: Arsenal not impacted by dropping to 2nd
summary: Arsenal manager Mikel Arteta dismissed concerns about psychological impact from dropping to second place in the Premier League, urging his team to focus entirely on a decisive five-game stretch to win the title.
content: Mikel Arteta has insisted Arsenal will suffer no psychological impact from dropping to second place in the Premier League and urged his team to go "all in" for a five-game shootout to win the title.

zh.title: 阿尔特塔：排名跌至第二不会影响阿森纳
zh.summary: 阿森纳主帅米克尔·阿尔特塔驳斥了排名跌至英超第二可能造成心理影响的担忧，敦促球队专注于接下来的五场决定性比赛以争夺英超冠军。

title: Flick: Barça must give more than 100% sans Yamal
summary: Barcelona manager Hansi Flick emphasized that his team must elevate their performance to maximum effort in order to secure the LaLiga title without winger Lamine Yamal, who is sidelined for the remainder of the season.
content: Hansi Flick says Barcelona players need to give more than 100% to get over the line in the LaLiga title run in after losing Lamine Yamal for the rest of the season.

zh.title: 弗利克：巴萨缺少亚马尔需发挥超水平
zh.summary: 巴塞罗那主帅汉西·弗利克强调，为了在边锋拉米尼·亚马尔整赛季无法出战的情况下赢得西甲冠军，球队必须付出最大努力。

title: Ranieri out as Roma adviser amid Gasperini spat
summary: Claudio Ranieri has departed his role as special adviser at AS Roma following a disagreement with head coach Gian Piero Gasperini, marking a breakdown in their working relationship at the Serie A club.
content: Claudio Ranieri is out as a special adviser at Roma following a falling out with coach Gian Piero Gasperini.

zh.title: 拉涅里离职罗马特别顾问 与加斯佩里尼产生分歧
zh.summary: 克劳迪奥·拉涅里因与罗马主教练詹皮罗·加斯佩里尼意见不合，已辞去AS罗马特别顾问一职，这标志着他们在这家意甲俱乐部工作关系的破裂。

title: De Ligt nears Man United comeback after injury
summary: Manchester United defender Matthijs de Ligt is progressing in his recovery from a back injury, with recent photos showing him training on grass as he approaches a potential return to competitive action.
content: Matthijs de Ligt has been pictured training on grass as the Manchester United defender steps up his rehabilitation from a nagging back injury.

zh.title: 德利赫特背伤恢复 接近曼联复出
zh.summary: 曼联后卫马蒂·德利赫特正在从背伤中恢复，近期照片显示他已在草地上训练，即将重返竞技赛场。

title: 👀How fun is your team to watch this season?
summary: While the Premier League has offered mixed entertainment value, Europe's top leagues are showcasing exceptional football this season, with ESPN's updated Watchability Rankings identifying the most captivating teams across the continent.
content: The Premier League has been a little boring at times this season, but there's brilliant, must-see soccer all over Europe if you know where to look. So check out our latest Watchability Rankings!

zh.title: 👀你的球队今季看起来有多有趣?
zh.summary: 虽然英超本赛季娱乐价值参差不齐，但欧洲顶级联赛呈现出精彩足球，ESPN更新的可观赏性排名确定了整个欧洲最引人入胜的球队。

title: First-month grades for all 16 NWSL teams: From an A+ to F
summary: ESPN has issued performance grades for all 16 NWSL teams following the first month of the season, ranging from A+ to F, evaluating their early-season form and competitive progress.
content: Is your team acing -- or flunking -- the early part of the NWSL season? We grade them all!

zh.title: 所有16支NWSL球队首月成绩：从A+到F
zh.summary: ESPN在赛季首月后为所有16支NWSL球队发布了表现成绩，范围从A+到F，评估了它们的早期赛季表现和竞争进展。

title: West Brom docked two points for financial breaches
summary: West Bromwich Albion has been handed a two-point penalty by the English Football League for violating profit and sustainability regulations, marking another financial sanction in the league.
content: West Bromwich Albion are given a two-point penalty by the English Football League for breaching profit and sustainability rules.

zh.title: 西布罗姆因财务违规被扣两分
zh.summary: 西布罗姆维奇队因违反英超财政和可持续性规定，被英足总处以两分罚款，这是联赛中又一项财务处罚。

title: Staying this long at Man Utd isn't for everyone - Fernandes
summary: Manchester United captain Bruno Fernandes reflected on his sustained commitment to the club, discussing the unique demands and pressures of maintaining a lengthy tenure at one of football's most scrutinized institutions.
content: Bruno Fernandes opens up about his time at Manchester United and why he decided to stay at the club.

zh.title: 在曼联待这么久不适合所有人 - 费尔南德斯
zh.summary: 曼联队长布鲁诺·费尔南德斯反思了他对俱乐部的持久承诺，讨论了在足球最受关注的机构之一维持长期任期的独特需求和压力。

title: Rangers fans face ban for derby amid dispute with Celtic
summary: Rangers have requested intervention from the Scottish Professional Football League after Celtic refused to allocate away tickets for the final Old Firm derby unless Rangers bans its Union Bears ultras group.
content: Rangers ask the Scottish Professional Football League to step in after Celtic refused to give away fans any tickets to the final Old Firm derby of the season unless the Ibrox club's Union Bears ultras group is banned.

zh.title: 流浪者队球迷在与凯尔特人队纠纷中面临德比禁令
zh.summary: 在凯尔特人队拒绝为最后一场老字号德比分配客队门票后，流浪者队要求苏格兰职业足球联赛干预，除非流浪者队禁止其Union Bears极端支持者组织。

title: Once locks, which USMNT players have their World Cup spots in jeopardy?
summary: While numerous U.S. national team players have secured spots for the 2026 World Cup, several previously considered locks are now at risk of missing out due to changing form and intensified competition for roster positions.
content: There are many players who will undoubtedly play for the United States at the 2026 World Cup. But some who were locks in the past are now set to probably miss out.

zh.title: 曾经稳定的位置，哪些美国国家队球员的世界杯参赛席位岌岌可危？
zh.summary: 虽然许多美国国家队球员已经确保了2026年世界杯的参赛席位，但由于状态变化和名单位置竞争加剧，几名之前被认为位置稳定的球员现在面临缺席的风险。

title: Premier League Power Rankings: Why Man City became faves and Arsenal dropped
summary: ESPN's Premier League Power Rankings show Manchester City solidifying their position as title favorites while Arsenal's standings decline, demonstrating that City's recent form represents a genuine competitive shift rather than temporary fluctuation.
content: ESPN's Premier League rankings return, as Man City prove their surge over Arsenal wasn't a blip.

zh.title: 英超电力排名：曼城为何成为夺冠热门而阿森纳排名下滑
zh.summary: ESPN的英超电力排名显示曼城巩固了其夺冠热门的地位，而阿森纳的排名下降，表明曼城最近的表现代表的是真正的竞争力转变，而不仅仅是暂时的波动。

title: Why I stayed at 'struggling' Man Utd and didn't think we'd be third now - Fernandes
summary: Manchester United captain Bruno Fernandes discusses his decision to remain at the club despite its struggles and reflects on the team's unexpected rise to third place in an interview with club legend Wayne Rooney. Fernandes' perspective offers insight into the team's turnaround and commitment to the project. The conversation highlights the changing narrative around Manchester United's season.
content: Manchester United captain Bruno Fernandes speaks to club legend Wayne Rooney in a wide-ranging interview.

zh.title: 我为什么留在'陷入困境的'曼联，没想到我们现在能排第三——费尔南德斯
zh.summary: 曼联队长布鲁诺·费尔南德斯在与俱乐部传奇人物韦恩·鲁尼的采访中讨论了他决定留在这家俱乐部的原因，尽管球队当时困难重重，并反思了球队令人意外地升至第三名的情况。费尔南德斯的观点深入揭示了球队的复苏和对项目的承诺。这次谈话强调了曼联本赛季叙述的转变。

title: The remarkable rise of Chelsea's little-known interim boss
summary: Chelsea's interim head coach Calum McFarlane reflects on an extraordinary year rising from relative obscurity to leading the club to the FA Cup semi-final at Wembley. McFarlane describes the rapid ascent as a "whirlwind," highlighting the unexpected nature of his appointment and subsequent success. His journey underscores both the volatility of football management and Chelsea's search for stability.
content: Chelsea's interim head coach Calum McFarlane admits this year has been a "whirlwind", going from obscurity to an FA Cup semi‑final at Wembley.

zh.title: 切尔西鲜为人知的临时主帅的非凡崛起
zh.summary: 切尔西临时主教练卡卢姆·麦克法兰回顾了从相对默默无闻到带领球队闯入温布利足总杯半决赛的非凡一年。麦克法兰将这次快速上升描述为一场"旋风"，强调了他被任命的出人意料和随后取得的成功。他的经历突出了足球管理的不稳定性和切尔西对稳定性的追求。

title: What next in battle to avoid Premiership play-off?
summary: Scottish Premiership clubs remain locked in a tense battle to avoid the relegation play-off, with Livingston at risk of mathematical elimination this weekend. The high stakes and tight points margins have created a dramatic finish to the season. The outcome will determine which teams face the additional hurdle of the play-off round.
content: Livingston could go down as soon as this weekend, but how is the battle to avoid the Premiership relegation play-off shaping up?

zh.title: 争取避免超级联赛附加赛——下一步是什么?
zh.summary: 苏格兰超级联赛俱乐部陷入激烈争夺，试图避免降级附加赛，利文斯顿面临在本周末数学出局的风险。高风险和紧张的积分差距使赛季结束阶段充满戏剧性。最终结果将决定哪些球队需要参加附加赛这一额外的挑战。

title: Ex-Brighton boss Hughton reveals cancer diagnosis
summary: Former Brighton and Newcastle manager Chris Hughton has disclosed that he underwent treatment for prostate cancer the previous year. The revelation provides insight into the personal challenges faced by a respected football figure beyond the pitch. Hughton's openness about his health journey may help raise awareness about the condition.
content: Former Brighton and Newcastle manager Chris Hughton reveals he was treated for prostate cancer last year.

zh.title: 前布莱顿主帅休顿公开癌症诊断
zh.summary: 前布莱顿和纽卡斯尔经理克里斯·休顿透露，他在前一年接受了前列腺癌治疗。这一披露让人们了解到这位受人尊敬的足球人物在球场之外面临的个人挑战。休顿公开谈论他的健康历程可能有助于提高人们对这种疾病的认识。

title: Any Celtic boss would back new deals for trio - O'Neill
summary: Interim manager Martin O'Neill believes that whichever permanent manager takes over Celtic in the summer would support recent contract extensions given to Liam Scales, Luke McCowan, and James Forrest. The renewals represent the club's confidence in key squad members and continuity planning ahead of a managerial transition. O'Neill's statement suggests internal consensus on these players' quality.
content: Interim manager Martin O'Neill thinks whoever takes permanent control this summer would be happy that Liam Scales, Luke McCowan and James Forrest have been handed new deals.

zh.title: 任何凯尔特人主帅都会支持三人续约 - 奥尼尔
zh.summary: 临时经理马丁·奥尼尔相信，无论哪位永久经理在夏季接管凯尔特人队，都会支持最近给予利亚姆·斯卡尔斯、卢克·麦考万和詹姆斯·福雷斯特的合同延期。续约代表了俱乐部对关键球员的信心和在主帅交接前的连续性规划。奥尼尔的声明表明内部对这些球员素质的共识。

title: Former Nigeria striker Eneramo dies during match
summary: Michael Eneramo, a former Nigeria international with 10 caps for the Super Eagles, died at age 40 after suffering a suspected cardiac arrest during a friendly match. His sudden death during play underscores the medical risks that can occur in football. The incident highlights the importance of medical support and awareness in the sport.
content: Michael Eneramo, who won 10 caps for the Super Eagles, dies aged 40 after suffering a suspected cardiac arrest during a friendly game.

zh.title: 前尼日利亚前锋埃内拉莫在比赛中去世
zh.summary: 前尼日利亚国际球员迈克尔·埃内拉莫为超级雄鹰队出场10次，在一场友谊赛中疑似心脏骤停后于40岁时去世。他在比赛中的突然去世强调了足球运动中可能发生的医疗风险。这一事件突出了体育运动中医疗支持和意识的重要性。

title: Hearts, Rangers, Celtic - who will lead Premiership by end of Sunday?
summary: The Scottish Premiership title race has reached its decisive phase with Hearts, Rangers, and Celtic separated by just three points and only five games remaining. The competitive three-way battle represents one of the most compelling finishes to a Scottish top-flight season. The outcome will be determined by consistency and performance in upcoming crucial matches.
content: Three teams separated by three points with just five games to go. After an epic season, the Scottish Premiership split is finally here.

zh.title: 哈茨、流浪者、凯尔特人——谁将在周日结束时领先苏格兰超级联赛？
zh.summary: 苏格兰超级联赛争冠战进入决胜阶段，哈茨、流浪者和凯尔特人仅相差三分，还剩五场比赛。这三队的竞争代表了苏格兰顶级联赛最引人入胜的收官之一。最终结果将由各队在即将到来的关键比赛中的稳定表现决定。

title: Rochdale and York set for 'unique' title decider
summary: York City and Rochdale will battle on the final day of the National League season in a title decider, with manager Stuart Maynard calling it "one of the biggest games in the English football pyramid." The match carries significant stakes for both clubs aiming to win the competition and secure promotion. The one-off showdown encapsulates the drama of competitive sports at the grassroots level.
content: York City boss Stuart Maynard calls his side's final day National League title decider at Rochdale "one of the biggest games in the English football pyramid.

zh.title: 洛奇代尔和约克将迎来"独特的"冠军决战
zh.summary: 约克城队和洛奇代尔队将在全国联赛最后一天争夺冠军，经理斯图尔特·梅纳德称其为"英式足球金字塔中最大的比赛之一"。这场比赛对两支都致力于赢得联赛和争取晋级资格的球队都至关重要。这场决赛体现了基层竞技足球的戏剧性。

title: Why Rosenior failed at Chelsea, and what club must change for next manager
summary: Liam Rosenior's tenure at Chelsea failed to win over players and fans, revealing deeper structural problems at the club. Chelsea's ownership must address these organizational issues before appointing a successor who can succeed.
content: Liam Rosenior couldn't win over Chelsea's players or fans as manager. Now the club's owners must reevaluate the structure that led to his appointment.

The ban underscores UEFA's commitment to tackling discriminatory behavior in football. The disciplinary action reflects the governing body's ongoing efforts to create a more inclusive environment in the sport.
content: Gianluca Prestianni is given a six-game ban by Uefa for homophobic conduct during Benfica's Champions League knockout play-off match with Real Madrid in February.
